title: centaurea × aellenii
intro: Centaurea × aellenii, also known as Mountain Cornflower, is a hybrid plant species within the Centaurea genus, characterized by its showy purple flowers and delicate foliage. The medicinal properties of Centaurea × aellenii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of consuming this plant are largely anecdotal, but it is believed to have a positive effect on digestion and may help to reduce inflammation in the body. Centaurea × aellenii can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
